title: EntityRecord
description: Canonical entity (brand/product/integration/competitor) record owned by entity-resolution-service. Public business-name content, not customer source or PII.
$comment: compat_class: closed, signed: false (non-signed closed contract, same family as SourceSnapshot/PatchArtifact/AuditEvent per ADR-0024(b) '비서명 closed 계약'). Authority: docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md P1 table row 'EntityRecord | entity-resolution | entity_id+graph_version' (idempotency key); docs/architecture/wave4-plan.md 'Existing vs new events' domain-contract candidate list; services/intelligence/entity-resolution-service/README.md ('Primary responsibility: brand/product/integration/competitor canonicalization', 'Owned data: entity graph'). project_id (not a raw customer identifier) reflects data-ownership.md cross-cutting rule that entity-resolution consumes demand-graph's project-scoped output. entity_id/graph_version together are the idempotency key per the catalog row; entity_id is an opaque local identifier (mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape, e.g. workspace_id/project_id/site_id) not promoted to the shared common file since it is not one of the 6 CONFIRMED core business identifiers (docs/architecture/api-event-contracts.md).

project_id.$comment: data-ownership.md cross-cutting rule — entity-resolution consumes demand-graph's project-scoped output.

entity_id.$comment: contract-catalog.md:40 idempotency key component 'entity_id+graph_version'. Opaque, mirrors common/identifiers/v1 opaque-id shape.

graph_version.$comment: contract-catalog.md:40 idempotency key component 'entity_id+graph_version'. Opaque version token, mirrors event/site-inventory-completed inventory_version shape.

canonical_name.$comment: Canonicalized public business name — not customer source content or PII (bounded length, no free-form document).
